sine_agent_cfg
oscillator_agent_cfg
sine_agent_cfg

Extension of the oscillator_agent_cfg that contains the proxy necessary for mixed-signal agents.

Variables
vproxy
sine_proxy vproxy

Proxy used by the driver and monitor to configure mixed-signal values

amplitude_threshold
real amplitude_threshold

Like frequency detection threshold, but with amplitude

points_per_period
int points_per_period

The number of points driven per oscillation period, like FFT sampling.  Also like FFT, more points -> more precise but also longer sim time.  Recommend to use multiples of 4 to get a precise min and max.
